logout.title: Sign Out?
logout.description: You will need to sign in again to access your data.

notifications.copy_failed_manual: Copy failed. Please long-press to select text and copy manually

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.no_analysis: No analysis available for this question.

subjects.title: Subject Distribution
subjects.empty: No subjects yet. Import questions to get started.

milestone.title: Performance Milestone
milestone.desc: You successfully stabilized <1>{{count}} concepts</1> within the last 7-day period.

insight.title: Learning Insights
insight.desc: Analysis of your last <1>{{count}} interactions</1> suggests an optimal recall target of <2>{{percentage}}%</2>.
insight.action_rest: Learning queue cleared. We recommend periodic rest.

quality.title: Diagnostic Metrics
quality.new_traps_desc: High-frequency errors identified in the last 7 days.

hero.title: Manage your
hero.subtitle: Knowledge Base.
hero.status: {{count}} items are pending review. Synchronize now to maintain data consistency.

clear.title: Queue Synchronized
clear.desc: All scheduled tasks for today have been completed.

empty.title: System Cold Start
empty.desc: Import structured data to initialize your knowledge repository.

import.title: Data Import
import.benefit: Convert raw materials into practice units.

footer.insight_desc: Latest optimization parameters have been calculated.

review.exit_confirm: You've reviewed {{reviewed}} items with {{remaining}} remaining. Are you sure you want to exit?

rating.footer: Engagement feedback will optimize the next exposure interval.

setup.title: Choose Your Review Strategy
setup.desc: Select a prioritization method based on the FSRS spaced repetition algorithm to study more efficiently.
setup.tip: Pro Tip: 'Optimal' mode uses the FSRS engine to prioritize items with the highest projected decay.

optimal.label: Recommended
optimal.desc: Balances urgency and difficulty to prioritize items that need the most attention.

overdue.label: Overdue First
overdue.desc: Sorts by how long items are past due, tackling the most delayed ones first.

weakness.label: Weakest First
weakness.desc: Focuses on items with the lowest retention, helping you strengthen weak spots.

challenge.label: Hardest First
challenge.desc: Tackles the most difficult items first while your focus is sharpest.

fresh.label: Newest First
fresh.desc: Reviews recently added items first to reinforce new learning.

random.label: Random Order
random.desc: Shuffles the order to simulate real test conditions and improve flexibility.

complete.title: Session Mastered
complete.subtitle: Knowledge points have been consolidated into your long-term memory.
complete.quote: Consistency is the catalyst for long-term retention.

empty.title: All Caught Up
empty.desc: Excellent! No cards are due for review right now. You can add new questions to your library or check back later.
empty.hint: New reviews will be scheduled automatically by the FSRS algorithm

early.title: Want to keep studying?
early.warning: Early review may affect optimal FSRS scheduling

upload.desc: Support Markdown, JSON, or plain text. We'll automatically convert your notes into cards.
upload.dropzone: Drop files here or click to upload
upload.drop_hint: or drag and drop files here
upload.tip_desc: Stay atomic: one card, one concept. This significantly boosts long-term recall efficiency.
upload.security_desc: Your data remains private. Never used for training.
upload.privacy_desc: Your data is processed locally in your browser for maximum privacy.
upload.resources_desc: Download templates for easier data import.
upload.feature_preview_desc: See exactly how cards will look during study.
upload.paste_ph: Paste your JSON or CSV content here...

done.title: Import Successful
done.desc: Questions have been successfully imported into your library.
done.desc_failed: An error occurred during import. Please check the report.
done.desc_partial: Partial success. Some items require attention.

quick_import.title: Express Import
quick_import.subtitle: JSON Object Ingestion
quick_import.skipped: {{count}} records rejected due to validation failure.
quick_import.help_opt_fields: question_type, difficulty, content, answer, explanation, tags

grid.empty_desc: Modify filter parameters or ingest new data.

selection_banner.hint: Click to select · Shift + Click for range · Esc to abort

inspector.select_guide: Select any item from the grid to view its details.

meta.title: Study Metrics
meta.estimated_recall: Estimated time until retention drops to 90%

edit.title: Edit Question
edit.ph_explain: Enter final solution, strategy, and comprehensive explanation...
edit.why_choice: Explain why this option is correct/wrong...
edit.no_correct_warning: Please mark at least one correct answer
edit.blanks_hint: One answer per blank in order

bulk.title: Bulk Actions
bulk.tags_append_hint: Tags will be added to existing ones
bulk.warning: Applying change to {{count}} items. This action is irreversible.

unsaved_modal.title: Unsaved Changes
unsaved_modal.description: The current question has unsaved modifications. Leaving will discard your work.

header.title: Exams
header.subtitle: Create and manage tests from your question library

stats.avg_score_tooltip: Your average precision across all tests.
stats.total_time_tooltip: Cumulative time spent on formal testing.
stats.weak_subjects_tooltip: Areas where you frequently make mistakes.

milestone.title: Progress Milestone
milestone.desc: Tracking your proficiency growth over time.

eval.title: Exam Mode
eval.desc: Hide feedback until submission. Best for formal testing.

drill.title: Practice Mode
drill.desc: Get instant feedback after each response.

list.title: Recent Exams
list.empty_desc: Complete your first exam to see results here.

timer.paused_desc: Session state cached. Select Resume to proceed.
timer.tab_warning: Switching active tabs does not suspend the temporal engine.
timer.abandon_warning: Session state will not be committed. Progress will be lost.

step1.title: Define Domains
step1.error: A minimum of one domain must be specified.

step2.title: Targeting Parameters
step2.desc: Specify optional filters for granular targeting.

weakness.title: Deficiency Prioritization
weakness.desc: Target units with statistical high error rates.

due_first.title: Recall Prioritization
due_first.desc: Target units at the critical decay threshold.

live_stats.title: Configuration Analytics
live_stats.desc: Real-time estimation based on current parameters.
live_stats.not_found_desc: Refine parameters to expand potential selection.
live_stats.insufficient_tip: Payload size is below recommended threshold.

hero.title: Collaborative Library
hero.desc: Access high-quality shared repositories and maintain bidirectional synchronization.

confirm.title: Confirm Operational Update
confirm.warning: This procedure will overwrite local modifications with the remote master version. This is irreversible.
confirm.checkbox: I acknowledge and authorize the overwrite procedure.

auth.required_desc: Please authorize to access high-frequency network features.

lineage.title: Provenance & Versioning
lineage.license: Governed by Creative Commons (CC BY 4.0) attribution standards.

matrix.title: Advanced Analytics
matrix.benefit: Visualize cognitive trends over temporal cycles.

profile.title: User Profile
profile.desc: How you appear in the system.

temporal.title: Time & Schedule
temporal.desc: Configure how the daily cycle is calculated.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.push_desc: Receive review reminders on your device.
notifications.drift_desc: Notify if algorithm parameters change significantly.
notifications.sync_desc: Show toast when data sync finishes.

profiles.page_desc: Configure specialized learning strategies for different knowledge domains.

picker.title: Add Subject Override
picker.desc: Select a subject to create custom FSRS settings

inheritance.label: Inheritance Mode
inheritance.revert_confirm: Revert to inherited state? All custom settings for this subject will be cleared.

overview.unreliable_hint: Projections may be unreliable due to low data volume.
overview.empty: Optimization engine requires active interaction logs.
overview.empty_desc: Start reviewing to generate workload predictions and map potential stability decay.

sandbox.label: Sandbox Mode
sandbox.desc: Changes made here are isolated until applied to production.

diff.title: Manual Tuning Warning
diff.confirm_risk: I understand that manual weight tuning may lead to scheduling instability.

dirty_bar.discard_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?

toast.delete_success: Subject override removed. Fallback to global settings.

modal.unsaved_desc: You have uncommitted changes to the current profile. What would you like to do?

algorithm.title: Algorithm Settings (FSRS)
algorithm.desc: Algorithmic optimization of review intervals. 90% is the balanced optimum.

retention.title: Retention Strategy
retention.desc: Configure the target recall probability for the FSRS model.
retention.label: Global Retention

capacity.title: Load Management
capacity.desc: Define daily volume constraints and intensity.
capacity.daily_cap_desc: Limits daily review items to maintain a sustainable workload.
capacity.style_desc: Adjusts spacing to prioritize mastery or efficiency.

presets.title: Model Presets
presets.desc: Select a pre-configured weight set for standard learning patterns.

balanced.name: Standard Equilibrium
balanced.desc: Default optimized parameters for general use.

conservative.name: Persistence Priority
conservative.desc: Higher frequency reviews for high-stakes recall.

aggressive.name: Efficiency Priority
aggressive.desc: Extended intervals for maximum learning throughput.

algorithm.subject_config_desc: Access per-subject profiles to manage specialized optimization strategies.
algorithm.locked_desc: Manual weight tuning is restricted to avoid model degradation.

expert.title: Expert Tuning
expert.custom_weights_detected: Manual configuration detected. This overrides standard optimization algorithms.

appearance.title: Theme Mode
appearance.desc: Select how the interface adapts to your environment.

ux.title: VFX & Motion
ux.desc: Configure interface animations and visual polish.

keys.title: Access Keys
keys.desc: Manage your personal access tokens for API integrations.

sync.title: Device Sync
sync.desc: Manage cloud synchronization across your devices.

expert.warning: Warning: Manual tuning may affect scheduling accuracy.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.desc: Manage your keyboard shortcuts for efficiency.

inspector.title: Question Inspector
inspector.desc: Shortcuts in the library detail panel

suggest.vpn: Try disabling any active VPN or proxy
suggest.browser: Ensure your browser is up to date
suggest.storage: Check if your disk is full
suggest.contact: If the issue persists, contact support

not_found.title: Page Not Found
not_found.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

boundary.title: Application Error
boundary.message: An unexpected error occurred. You can retry or return to the home page.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.desc: Sign in to synchronize your learning data.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.desc: Join the community for personalized spaced-repetition.
signup.switch: Already have an account? Sign in

fields.remember_me_hint: Disable on shared devices to protect your privacy.

status.success_signup: Account created! Please check your email for verification.
status.error_general: Authentication failed. Please try again later.
status.error_email_not_confirmed: Please verify your email address first.
status.error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.
status.error_network: Network error. Please check your connection.
status.error_password_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
status.reset_email_required: Please enter your email to reset password.
status.reset_sent: A password reset link has been sent to your email.

hero.headline: Build your personal knowledge base
hero.subtitle: Professional error management and spaced-repetition system powered by the FSRS algorithm.

header.title: Management
header.subtitle: Configure subjects, tags, and track system logs

subjects.add_hint: Define a new area of expertise

modals.propagate_hint: Changes will be applied to all associated items upon saving.

delete.title: Confirm Delete
delete.desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the {{type}} "{{name}}"? This action is recorded in logs and cannot be easily undone.

merge.title: Merge Assets
merge.subtitle: Consolidate duplicate {{type}}s into a target item
merge.critical_warning: Important: The source item will be deleted. All associated items will be remapped immediately.

audit_tab.warning: Activity logs are immutable. Use revert functionality with caution as it impacts data consistency.

panel.hints_desc: Intelligent scaffolding and contextual hints will appear here as you study.
panel.backlinks_tip: Tip: Global notes that mention this question will be linked automatically under the "Backlinks" tab.
panel.no_hints: No hints available for this unit
panel.hint_cta_start: Unlock the first layer of logical scaffolding
panel.hint_cta_next: Reveal another dimension of the problem

backlinks.empty_desc: Cross-reference this question in a global notebook to establish a link.
